subject: Use of averaged .mrc images in Subtomo pipeline
body:
Hi folks,

Does the averaged .mrc images (motion-average of frames of tilt-images) 
have any role in the Subtomogram pipeline of M/WARP/Relion? 

I perused the .xml and .tomostar file of the tilt series and they store the 
info about the .tif images (frames-series) for each tilt angle, but do not 
have any links to the averaged .mrc images (stored in the average folder)? 

I was hoping to delete those after .tif processing to save space and reduce 
clutter. 

Thanks and cheers,
Digvijay
